title: aegonychon goulandrisiorum subsp. thessalicum
intro: Aegonychon goulandrisiorum subsp. thessalicum, commonly known as the Thessaly Aegonychon, is a plant species within the Boraginaceae family. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties attributed to its bioactive compounds. Studies have shown that Aegonychon goulandrisiorum subsp. thessalicum has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, and its preparations are also used in modern medicine as dietary supplements and pharmaceuticals.
